subject: test(pwa): add index.html literal-href tripwire from pattern doc
body:
Closes the ICON_CACHE_BUST tripwire by adding the one source-level test
from the glow-props pattern doc that wasn't already in the suite.
iconCacheBustHtml() throws at build time on missing literals, but a unit
test fails the same drift in milliseconds without a full build.

Also refreshes SESSION_NOTES with the dist-level verification results.

Tags: pwa, test, icon-cache-bust
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: icon-cache-bust
Semver: patch
